extracurriculars.description: Assists in editing and producing the school yearbook; responsible for layout, photography curation, and editorial decisions.
Leads a club that uses photography as a tool for social impact and storytelling in the community.
Academic honor society recognising students with outstanding GPA and commitment to scholarship and service.

community_service.description: Volunteers as an activity assistant at a senior living facility, engaging residents in social and recreational activities.

awards_and_honors.title: California Scholarship Federation (CSF) Member
awards_and_honors.description: Recognised for academic excellence and community service.

defining_experiences: Leading Photos with Purpose — using photography to give voice to underrepresented stories
Volunteering with seniors at Alara Senior Living — bridging generations through presence and care
Shaping the school's visual narrative as Yearbook Vice Editor
Navigating identity as a gay young woman and channeling that into storytelling and creative work
essay_themes.future_goals: Pursue a career in advertising, combining visual storytelling and creative strategy to craft campaigns that are inclusive, authentic, and move people — particularly campaigns that represent LGBTQ+ voices and communities.
essay_themes.unique_story: Penelope channels creativity into community — whether capturing meaningful moments through her camera, preserving school memories in the yearbook, or bringing joy to seniors. Her path to advertising is rooted in a genuine belief that images and stories can change how people see the world, and as a gay woman she brings a perspective on representation and authentic storytelling that is both personal and powerful.
essay_themes.challenges_overcome: As a gay student, Penelope has navigated questions of identity and belonging during high school, channeling that experience into empathy-driven creative work and a commitment to amplifying underrepresented voices.
